footer.blurb: An elegant wedding hall where refined detail meets heartfelt celebration — for moments that last forever.

hero.title: Where the most beautiful moments begin
hero.subtitle: A luxury hall, full-service planning, and digital memories that last.

intro.heading: Welcome to Qasr Al-Farah
intro.body: We believe every moment of your wedding deserves to be perfect. Our elegant hall, attentive team, and seamless services come together to create a day you will carry in your heart forever.

highlights.title: Luxury hall
highlights.text: A refined, spacious venue thoughtfully designed to host your guests in comfort and style.

highlights.title: Digital memory book
highlights.text: Guests share their wishes and photos in a keepsake digital book that lasts a lifetime.

highlights.title: Flexible add-ons
highlights.text: Zaffa, professional photography, theatrical lighting, and bespoke décor — curated for you.

highlights.title: Guest QR memories
highlights.text: Guests scan a QR code to contribute their moments directly from the hall in real time.

servicesSection.heading: Our Packages
servicesSection.subheading: Complete wedding bundles that bring everything your day needs into one place

gallerySection.heading: Our work
gallerySection.subheading: A glimpse of our finest moments

memoryTeaser.heading: Digital memory book
memoryTeaser.body: Gather guest wishes, messages, and photos into one beautiful digital keepsake — yours forever.

contactTeaser.heading: We are here for you
contactTeaser.body: Reach out with any questions or to arrange a visit. Our team is always happy to help you plan.

services.heading: Our Packages
services.subheading: Complete wedding packages under one roof

whatAwaits.title: What Awaits You
whatAwaits.subtitle: Browse the experience booklets as if they were in your hands

booking.selectDateFirst: Select a date to see the available times
booking.disclaimer: This is a visit/booking request only. Your reservation is not confirmed until the hall contacts you to confirm the details.
